# LocalWise Test Sample Documents

This directory contains sample documents and test data for the LocalWise test suite.

## Sample Documents

### sample_research_paper.txt
A mock research paper about AI and knowledge management.

### sample_data.csv  
Sample CSV data with employee information.

### sample_config.json
Sample JSON configuration file.

### sample_settings.yaml
Sample YAML configuration file.

### sample_structure.xml
Sample XML data structure.

### test_code.py
Sample Python code file.

### test_script.js
Sample JavaScript code file.

## Usage

These files are used by the test suite to verify LocalWise functionality:

- File processing capabilities
- Text extraction accuracy
- Metadata handling
- Multi-format support
- Error handling

## Adding New Test Files

When adding new test files:

1. Place files in this directory
2. Update conftest.py to include new file types
3. Add corresponding test cases
4. Document the file purpose and content structure
